name: energy_efficient
summary: Train a smooth, low-effort gait. Favor smoothness and small actions over peak tracking accuracy and over showy gait shapes.
priorities: Strong action_rate_l2 penalty for smooth motor commands
Strong joint_acc_l2 penalty for low joint acceleration
Moderate tracking_lin_vel — accurate enough but not aggressive
soft_landing reward to avoid impact spikes
avoid: Letting tracking_lin_vel weight grow large enough to cause oscillations
notes: Tracking error within ~10-15% of command is acceptable if energy proxies improve.
